overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing a student character in dark robes walking through a foggy stone corridor and entering the iconic Great Hall during dinner time. The scene transitions from a dimly lit gothic hallway to the grand candlelit dining hall with floating candles and students at long tables.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark gothic stone corridor with arched ceilings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dimly lit stone corridor toward large wooden doors at the end

entered.detail: pointed stone archway framing the corridor end with intricate carvings
large dark wooden doors with metal braces and ring handles
tall cylindrical stone columns lining the left side of the corridor
tall cylindrical stone columns lining the right side of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, foggy stone corridor with gothic architecture. Tall stone pillars line both sides as the character approaches a large set of wooden double doors at the far end, with the camera following steadily from behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand dining hall entrance with floating candles

events.description: character pushes open the large wooden doors revealing the brightly lit Great Hall
lighting shifts dramatically from dim torchlight to warm candlelight from hundreds of floating candles

agents.ego_description: pushing open the heavy wooden doors and stepping into the vast candlelit Great Hall

notable_agents.action: students in dark robes seated at long house tables eating dinner

entered.detail: hundreds of lit candles suspended magically in mid-air illuminating the hall
high vaulted stone ceiling with wooden rafters disappearing into shadows
tall gothic windows showing blue twilight sky outside
long wooden house tables lined with students and dinner settings
large stone fireplace with burning fire on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character opens the doors and enters the magnificent Great Hall, transitioning from the narrow corridor to the vast open space. Hundreds of floating candles illuminate the high vaulted ceiling above long dining tables where students are eating dinner, with warm firelight from a large stone fireplace on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: Hogwarts Great Hall during dinner service with floating candles

events.description: camera pans right and tilts upward to reveal the full scale of the dining hall and ceiling
UI overlay appears in bottom right indicating 6:30pm Dinner time

agents.ego_description: standing in the hall observing the dinner proceedings while the camera pans to showcase the architecture

notable_agents.action: student in light-colored robes walking along the aisle between the tables

entered.detail: vertical house banners hanging on the far stone walls
rows of tall gothic windows showing dark blue evening sky

segments.scene_description: The camera settles into a panoramic view of the Great Hall, showcasing the dense crowd of students dining at long tables beneath the floating candles. The architecture reveals tall stained glass windows on the left showing the blue hour sky outside, while house banners hang on the far walls. A UI element indicates it is 6:30pm dinner time as students continue their meals and conversations.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, foggy corridor into the expansive, candlelit grandeur of the Great Hall. It begins by trailing a character through a narrow stone hallway lined with gothic pillars, moving steadily toward a set of large wooden double doors. As the character opens these doors, the scene abruptly expands from the dim corridor into a vast open space illuminated by hundreds of floating candles and the warm glow of a large stone fireplace. The camera then shifts into a panoramic view, revealing long dining tables crowded with students beneath a high vaulted ceiling. Finally, the perspective opens further to showcase house banners and tall stained glass windows reflecting the blue hour sky as the dinner hour unfolds.
